# core_theme IDE Baseline Capture (8T2)

This file records the source-of-truth IDE defaults used to seed `core_theme` `ide_gray`.

## Captured Mapping

- `CORE_THEME_COLOR_SURFACE_0` = `{20,20,20,255}`
  - Source: `ide/src/ide/UI/layout.c` (`theme.bgEditor`)
- `CORE_THEME_COLOR_SURFACE_1` = `{30,30,30,255}`
  - Source: `ide/src/ide/UI/layout.c` (`theme.bgToolBar` / `theme.bgControlPanel`)
- `CORE_THEME_COLOR_SURFACE_2` = `{40,40,40,255}`
  - Source: `ide/src/ide/UI/layout.c` (`theme.bgMenuBar` / `theme.bgIconBar`)
- `CORE_THEME_COLOR_TEXT_PRIMARY` = `{255,255,255,255}`
  - Source: `ide/src/ide/UI/layout.c` (`theme.text`)
- `CORE_THEME_COLOR_TEXT_MUTED` = `{100,100,100,255}`
  - Source: `ide/src/engine/Render/render_helpers.c` (`gray`)
- `CORE_THEME_COLOR_ACCENT_PRIMARY` = `{140,150,240,255}`
  - Source: `ide/src/engine/Render/render_pipeline.c` (hover border override)
